doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: fabricated
reason: The PRISMA 2020 citation is real, but the document's content on "citation verification" and "common errors" does not match the actual checklist-based statement and appears invented.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The citation (Page et al., BMJ 2021, n71) is real, but the actual PRISMA 2020 statement consists of a 27-item checklist on reporting items—not the prose sections shown here on "citation verification" and "common errors," which appear invented.
